sentences.arabic: لَا تُحِبُّ دِيمَةُ الْأَكْلَ السَّرِيعَ وَتَطْبُخُ فِي الْبَيْتِ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Dima ne voli brzu hranu i uvijek kuha kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Dima does not like fast food and always cooks at home.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ زَيْتَ الزَّيْتُونِ بَدَلَ الزُّبْدَةِ فِي الطَّبْخِ.
sentences.translation: Koristi maslinovo ulje umjesto putera u kuhanju.
sentences.translationEn: She uses olive oil instead of butter when cooking.

sentences.arabic: تُضِيفُ الْخُضَرَ الطَّازَجَةَ إِلَى كُلِّ وَجْبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Dodaje svježe povrće u svaki obrok.
sentences.translationEn: She adds fresh vegetables to every meal.

sentences.arabic: أَصْدِقَاؤُهَا يُحِبُّونَ أَكْلَهَا وَيَأْتُونَ إِلَى بَيْتِهَا كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Njeni prijatelji vole njenu hranu i često dolaze kod nje.
sentences.translationEn: Her friends love her food and come to her house often.
